name: HR professional development policy example
answer:
Employees may request 10 hours of professional development each quarter after manager approval.
Employees may request 30 hours of professional development each quarter after manager approval.
Employees receive a monthly learning stipend.

sources.title: HR Professional Development Policy
sources.content:
Employees may request 10 hours of professional development each quarter after manager approval.
The company reimburses up to $1,200 per year for approved professional certifications.
